在英勇之戒中考验你的胆识吧，这是 Crucible 游戏系统首个开放的试玩测试。
Test your mettle in the Ring of Valor, the first available playtest for the Crucible game system.
Playtest 1 - The Ring of Valor.description:
英勇之戒是对《Crucible》中角色发展与战斗机制的引导式引言，让玩家扮演一支角斗士队伍，面对一连串不断升级的挑战。

The Ring of Valor is a guided introduction to character development and combat mechanics in Crucible which places players in the role of a gladiatorial team facing a sequence of escalating challenges.

Playtest One: The Ring of Valor.name: 试玩测试一：英勇之戒 Playtest One: The Ring of Valor

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
试玩测试一：英勇之戒 是对 Crucible 中角色发展与战斗机制的引导式引言，让玩家扮演一支角斗士队伍，在英勇之戒中面对一连串挑战。

玩家既可以按照 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{角色创建} 流程从零开始创建自己的角色（推荐），也可以使用 预生成英雄 compendium 包中提供的 1级预制角色。

这一挑战是为一支由四名玩家角色组成的队伍设计并平衡的，不过我们也鼓励你用更小或更大的队伍进行测试。挑战的难度可以通过调整 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.v1dqTT3NI35lFNxM]{对手} 的威胁等级来改变。

英勇之戒由六场战斗组成，每天一场，在此期间队伍将面对越来越危险的对手，最终迎来与卫冕冠军的决战——也就是上一支征服这座竞技场的英雄团队。每次遭遇结束后，队伍都会提升等级，然后再面对下一场考验。每场战斗都旨在引入新的游戏机制，并提供机会来测试通过升级获得的新能力。

提供反馈

如果你试玩测试了 Crucible 并体验了英勇之戒，请花一点时间在我们的社区 Discord 服务器的 #crucible 频道中 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.5SgXrAKS2EnqVggJ.JournalEntryPage.4Ggutuh9uzhcEXSK]{提供反馈}，帮助我们改进。

关于失败

通常在 Crucible 中——无论是因疯狂还是死亡而失败——都会成为角色旅程的终点。然而在这次初始试玩测试中，我们建议你作为游戏主持人采取更灵活的处理方式。

为了测试系统并收集有用的反馈，我们建议：如果队伍遭遇失败，可以允许他们反复尝试同一个挑战直到成功；或者，如果某一天的挑战实在过于困难、无法克服，也可以允许他们仍然晋升到下一个挑战。

Playtest One: The Ring of Valor is a guided introduction to character development and combat mechanics in Crucible which places players in the role of a gladiatorial team facing a sequence of challenges in the Ring of Valor.

Players may either create their own characters from scratch following the @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6]{Character Creation} process (recommended) or use the Level 1 premade characters provided in the Pregenerated Heroes compendium pack.

This challenge is designed and balanced for a party of four player characters, although we encourage you to test with a smaller or larger party as well. The difficulty of challenges can be adjusted by manipulating the threat level of @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.v1dqTT3NI35lFNxM]{Adversaries}.

The Ring of Valor consists of six battles, one each day, during which the party faces increasingly dangerous opponents culminating in a final match against the reigning champions - the last group of heroes to overcome the arena. After each encounter, the party advances in level before facing their next test. Each battle is designed to introduce new gameplay mechanics and provide an opportunity to test out new abilities gained through level advancement.

Providing Feedback

If you test Crucible and experience the Ring of Valor, please help us by taking a few moments to @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.5SgXrAKS2EnqVggJ.JournalEntryPage.4Ggutuh9uzhcEXSK]{Provide Feedback} in the #crucible channel of our community Discord server.

Regarding Defeat

Normally, in Crucible - defeat whether by Insanity or Death would be the end of a character's journey. In the case of this initial playtest, however, we recommend that you as the Gamemaster adopt a more flexible approach.

In the interest of testing the system and collecting useful feedback, we recommend allowing a party who experiences defeat to re-attempt the same challenge until successful OR to be permitted to advance to the next challenge regardless should one of the daily challenges prove too difficult to be surmounted.

Day One - The Feral Scramble.name: 第一天——野蛮争夺战 Day One - The Feral Scramble
Day One - The Feral Scramble.text:
在第一天的挑战中，4名1级英雄将对阵一群狂暴的野兽：

  • 4x @UUID[Actor.tqLT327VnrBXrLtj]{惠安娜} （½级仆从）

  • 4x @UUID[Actor.owg68yqumk7KxV9B]{Baizaz} （½级仆从）

主角威胁：1 × 4 = 4

对手威胁：⅓ × 8 = 2.66

遭遇难度：困难

引言

队伍来到沙地上，发现自己身处一座大型竞技场中，四周看台上挤满了欢呼的人群。一名解说员在俯瞰沙场的包厢中观战，竞技场的主人也坐在那里。解说员的声音经过魔法放大，传遍了整个竞技场。

这里是英勇之戒盛大展演的第一天，观众们已经彻底沸腾了！今天的第一场比赛即将开始，而当这些新来者第一次踏上沙场时，观众显然都迫不及待想看看他们会有怎样的表演。乱斗赛一直都是观众最喜爱的项目——这些新来者能否在这些饥肠辘辘的野兽面前存活下来，并赢得胜利呢？！

队伍被指示前往竞技场中央站定。惠安娜和Baizas分别以4只为一组，部署在竞技场两侧。队伍一到达竞技场中央，就给出片刻时间来营造紧张气氛，随后野兽便会从地图东西两侧的隧道中现身。将所有人加入一个战斗遭遇，并开始战斗，为第1轮掷先攻。

战术

惠安娜是群猎者，依靠夹击战术包围并不断袭扰单个主角，从其群猎者特性中获益。这个挑战可以作为对@UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.QhZgmBrdLAGwYy5c.JournalEntryPage.KGXiKFUWrPgb7wsx]{移动与夹击}机制的引导。

Baisaz在冲锋时拥有惊人的势头与力量。Baisaz会用它们的獠牙冲锋冲向目标，同时利用它们的移动或任何剩余动作重新与目标拉开距离，以便再次冲锋。

惠安娜和Baisaz都容易受到针对其@UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6.JournalEntryPage.FmmADsI9qo1uIIT3]{士气}的伤害影响。当这些野兽变得破碎时，它们会逃离竞技场，从最近的隧道撤退到下方的地下墓穴中。这个初始挑战也可以作为一次学习体验，让玩家明白打击敌人士气是通往胜利的一条有效道路。

晋升

当八只野兽全部被击败时，战斗结束。观众对队伍的表演很满意，解说员宣布队伍将在明天回归参加另一场比赛。

准备继续时，每名角色都应使用恢复动作来找回失去的资源，并且所有角色都应提升1级，晋升到2级，以迎战@UUID[.eQdArtcrGi4wobap]{第二天——锤子与铁砧}。

In the Day One challenge, 4 Level 1 heroes face off against a pack of frenzied beasts:

  • 4x @UUID[Actor.tqLT327VnrBXrLtj]{Huiana} (Level ½ Minion)

  • 4x @UUID[Actor.owg68yqumk7KxV9B]{Baizaz} (Level ½ Minion)

Protagonist Threat: 1 × 4 = 4

Adversary Threat: ⅓ × 8 = 2.66

Encounter Difficulty: Difficult

Introduction

The party emerges onto the sand to find themselves in a large arena, surrounded by stands containing a cheering crowd. A commentator spectates from a booth overlooking the sands, where the arena's owner sits. The Commentator's voice is amplified by magic, carried throughout the arena.

We're here on the first day of the Grand Exhibition at the Ring of Valor, and the crowd is already going wild! The first match of the day is about to begin, and as the newcomers step onto the sand for the first time, the crowd is clearly eager to see how they perform. The Scramble is always an audience favorite- will the newcomers survive and triumph against these ravenous wild beasts?!

The party is instructed to proceed to stand in the center of the arena. The Huiana and Baizas are positioned on either side of the arena in groups of 4. Once the party reaches the center of the arena, a few moments are given to build tension and then the beasts emerge from the tunnels on the East and West sides of the map. Add everyone to a Combat encounter and start the combat to roll Initiative for Round 1.

Tactics

The Huiana are pack hunters and rely on flanking tactics to surround and harry a single protagonist, benefitting from their Pack Hunter talent. This challenge serves as an introduction to @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.QhZgmBrdLAGwYy5c.JournalEntryPage.KGXiKFUWrPgb7wsx]{Movement and Flanking} mechanics.

The Baisaz have formidable momentum and power in their charge. The Baisaz will charge a target using their Tusk Charge while using their movement or any remaining action to regain separation from their target to charge again.

Both Huiana and Baisaz are weak against damage to their @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.gszlBVQ5fGh3y0I6.JournalEntryPage.FmmADsI9qo1uIIT3]{Morale}. When the beasts become broken they will flee the arena, retreating down the nearest tunnel into the catacombs below. This initial challenge can serve as a learning experince that demoralizing your foes is a useful path towards victory.

Advancement

The fight ends when all eight beasts have been defeated. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

When ready to proceed, characters should each use the Recover action to regain lost resources and all characters should gain a level, advancing to level 2 to face @UUID[.eQdArtcrGi4wobap]{Day Two - Hammer and Anvil}.

Day Two - Hammer and Anvil.name: 第2天 - 锤子与铁砧 Day Two - Hammer and Anvil
Day Two - Hammer and Anvil.text:
在第二天的挑战中，4名2级英雄将迎战角斗士双人组：@UUID[Actor.XA9W38PGmAs3ZLDa]{锤子}与@UUID[Actor.KSoJR8uwT5Qzka7p]{铁砧}（挑战9）。

  • @UUID[Actor.XA9W38PGmAs3ZLDa]{锤子}（3级精英）

  • @UUID[Actor.KSoJR8uwT5Qzka7p]{铁砧}（3级精英）

主角威胁：2 × 4 = 8

对手威胁：4 × 2 = 8

遭遇难度：致命

引言

“今天的英勇之戒天气晴朗，看起来我们将大饱眼福。今天的比赛标志着那对致命搭档的回归——赛场上的巨人，可怕二人组：锤子与铁砧。”

人群的欢呼声响起，播报员停顿了一下，随后继续说道：“多么热烈的欢迎！你们完全能听出观众有多么渴望再次看到这两位登场。让我们看看新的挑战者们能否顶住这场考验！”

队伍被指示在竞技场西侧的通道前集合。待队伍就位后，锤子与铁砧会从对面东侧的通道现身，战斗随即开始！

战术

锤子与铁砧是一对以协同配合作战的对手。

铁砧的战术主要围绕着贴近并擒抱一名敌人展开，从而为锤子创造攻击机会。铁砧会使用Hammer Toss让锤子迅速投入战局，然后使用Wrestler来压制敌人，并以强力打击施加沉重的打击。

锤子是一名散兵，会在战斗中进进出出，捕捉时机，利用连击释放一连串毁灭性的双持攻击，或使用打击 + 副手攻击的组合。任何试图脱离的敌人，锤子都会用断筋打击将其制服。

晋升

当锤子与铁砧都被击败后，这场战斗便告结束。观众对队伍的表演感到满意，解说员宣布队伍将在明天再次回归，参加另一场比赛。

队伍将获得一次休整机会，可以使用恢复动作，并提升1级晋升至3级，随后迎战@UUID[.v5EIDeTtHdQ7Wb5J]{第三天 - 骷髅军团}。

In the Day Two challenge, 4 Level 2 heroes face off against the gladiatorial duo of Hammer and Anvil (Challenge 9).

  • @UUID[Actor.XA9W38PGmAs3ZLDa]{Hammer} (Level 3 Elite)

  • @UUID[Actor.KSoJR8uwT5Qzka7p]{Anvil} (Level 3 Elite)

Protagonist Threat: 2 × 4 = 8

Adversary Threat: 4 × 2 = 8

Encounter Difficulty: Deadly

Introduction

"It's a beautiful day in the Ring of Valor, and it's looking like we're in for a treat. Today's match marks the return of that deadly duo, the giants of the game, the terrible two: Hammer and Anvil."

The announcer pauses as the crowd roars before continuing: "What a welcome! You can just hear how eager the fans are to see these two in action again. Let's see if our new contenders can stand up to the challenge!"

The party is instructed to gather in front of the tunnel on the west side of the arena. Once the party is in position, Hammer and Anvil emerge from the tunnel on the opposite east side and the battle begins!

Tactics

Hammer and Anvil are a pair of adversaries which fight as a coordinated team.

Anvil's tactics primarily focus on trying to get close and grapple an enemy in order to create opportunities for Hammer to attack. Anvil will use Hammer Toss to get Hammer quickly into the fray and then use Wrestler to restrain enemies and Heavy Strike to deliver punishing blows.

Hammer is a skirmisher, moving in and out of combat to capture opportunities to unleash a devastating sequence of dual-wield attacks using Flurry or using a Strike + Offhand Strike combo. Any enemies that attempt to disengage, Hammer will subdue using Hamstring.

Advancement

The fight ends when both Hammer and Anvil have been defeated. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

The party is given a chance to rest, use the Recover action, and gain a level advancing to Level 3 to face @UUID[.v5EIDeTtHdQ7Wb5J]{Day Three - The Skeletal Army}.

Day Three - The Skeletal Army.name: 第三天 - 骷髅军队 Day Three - The Skeletal Army
Day Three - The Skeletal Army.text:
在第三场挑战中，4名3级英雄将对决死灵法师奥里维奇及其骷髅大军！

  • @UUID[Actor.JuobjWohGACVeoyn]{奥里维奇}（3级Boss）

    • 召唤了 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.summons.Actor.56puGK932Qc0cowe]{死亡造物}（1级仆从）

  • 6x @UUID[Actor.aQkmEcwfImmdUINF]{骷髅枪兵}（1级仆从）

  • 6x @UUID[Actor.7jL3UmgXbqxXKClM]{骷髅弓箭手}（1级仆从）

主角威胁：3 × 4 = 12

敌方威胁：6 + (½ × 6) + (½ × 6) = 12

遭遇战难度：致命

引言

在这场挑战中，队伍被指示在竞技场北侧背靠悬崖列阵。

“欢迎诸位重返英勇之戒，迎接我们这场扣人心弦的连战第三日！今天，我们将庆祝重演历史上的一场著名战役。这几位勇敢的斗士，背后便是湮灭深渊的边缘，正面迎战可怖的死灵法师奥里维奇和他的骷髅大军！”

随着奥里维奇和他的骷髅仆从从南侧楼梯现身并进入竞技场，人群发出充满期待的欢呼。

奥里维奇和骷髅们会从南侧入口出现，并在遭遇开始前摆开战斗阵型！

战术

奥里维奇会采取防御性打法，依靠他的骷髅军团来制服敌人。作为Boss敌人，奥里维奇每轮拥有10动作，并且会在大多数法术上使用Compose屈折来节省专注，还会将剩余动作花在恢复专注上。

奥里维奇的战术核心是使用Create手势来召唤更多 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.summons.Actor.56puGK932Qc0cowe]{死亡造物} 仆从。由于拥有召唤师天赋，奥里维奇最多可以同时维持3个此类仆从。当被直接威胁时，他会使用Push 屈折将敌人向后逼退。

骷髅弓箭手会使用Strike集中火力攻击奥里维奇指定的目标，并用闪避射击调整自己的位置。骷髅枪兵则会向前冲锋，缠住敌方战士并阻挡他们的去路，同时尝试用扫腿将其绊倒。

晋升

当奥里维奇被击败时，战斗结束。死灵法师倒下后，他的骷髅仆从也会随之一同化为尘土。观众对队伍的表演十分满意，解说员宣布队伍将在明天回归，参加另一场比赛。

队伍将获得一次休息的机会，可以使用恢复动作，并提升1级晋升至4级。所有英雄还可以将其已装备武器的品质提升为精良。休息后，连战将继续，进入 @UUID[.hEpGF7rbNFVUMm86]{第四天 - Koy Rent}。

In the third challenge, 4 Level 3 heroes face off against the necromancer Orivech and his skeleton army!

  • @UUID[Actor.JuobjWohGACVeoyn]{Orivech} (Level 3 Boss)

    • Summoned @UUID[Compendium.crucible.summons.Actor.56puGK932Qc0cowe]{Creation of Death} (Level 1 Minion)

  • 6x @UUID[Actor.aQkmEcwfImmdUINF]{Skeletal Spearman} (Level 1 Minion)

  • 6x @UUID[Actor.7jL3UmgXbqxXKClM]{Skeletal Archer} (Level 1 Minion)

Protagonist Threat: 3 × 4 = 12

Adversary Threat: 6 + (½ × 6) + (½ × 6) = 12

Encounter Difficulty: Deadly

Introduction

For this challenge the party is instructed to assemble with their backs to the cliff on the North side of the arena.

"Welcome back - one and all - to the Ring of Valor for day three of our gripping gauntlet! Today we celebrate the reenactment of one of the historic battles of our history. These few brave champions, their backs to the edge of oblivion, facing down against the dread necromancer Orivech and his skeletal army!"

The crowd roars in eager anticipation as Orivech and his skeletal minions emerge from the south stairs and enter the arena.

Orivech and the skeletons emerge from the south entrance and array themselves in a battle formation before the encounter begins!

Tactics

Orivech will play defensively and rely upon his legion of skeletons to subdue his enemies. As a Boss enemy, Orivech has 10 Action per round and will use the Compose inflection on most spells in order to conserve Focus and will spend leftover Action on Recover Focus.

Orivech' tactics revolve around using the Create gesture to conjure more @UUID[Compendium.crucible.summons.Actor.56puGK932Qc0cowe]{Creation of Death} minions. Orivech can sustain up to 3 such minions at a time because of the Conjurer talent. When threatened directly he will use the Push inflection to force enemies backwards.

The Skeletal Archers will Strike to focus fire at whichever target Orivech designates, using Evasive Shot to reposition themselves. The Skeletal Spearman will rush forward to engage enemy fighters and block their path, trying to trip them with Leg Sweep.

Advancement

The fight ends when Orivech is defeated. When the necromancer falls, his skeletal minions disintegrate to dust alongside him. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

The party is given a chance to rest, use the Recover action, and gain a level advancing to Level 4. All heroes may also increase the quality of their equipped Weapons to Fine. After resting, the gauntlet continues with @UUID[.hEpGF7rbNFVUMm86]{Day Four - Koy Rent}.

Day Four - Koy Rent.name: 第4天 - 科伊·伦特 Day Four - Koy Rent
Day Four - Koy Rent.text:
在这第四项挑战中，4名4级英雄将与狼人威胁科伊·伦特正面交锋。

  • @UUID[Actor.3sGYsiKtgYLLkadw]{科伊·伦特}（7级Boss）

主角威胁：4 × 4 = 16

对手威胁：14

遭遇难度：困难

引言

在这项挑战中，队伍在竞技场东侧集结。

“今天的比赛很特别——一位已经退役的冠军将在这场仅限一天的表演赛中回归！各位观众，你们认识他，你们喜爱他，他在这里，他在那里，他无处不在！——科伊·伦特！伦特在遭受重伤后离开了擂台，在善解人意的观众欢呼声中退出了胜利的赛场。如今他重返赛事，我们不禁要问：他会一路攀升再度成为冠军，还是会败给这些新的竞争者？”

科伊·伦特从西侧入口进入竞技场，并立即发动攻击！

战术

科伊·伦特是一名强大的战士。作为一名7级Boss，他拥有可观的生命值和士气池，因此队伍几乎不可能在正面近战中抵挡住他的猛攻。

伦特会使用凶暴嚎叫施加恐慌状态，并迅速拉近距离，与尽可能多的敌人进入近战范围。面对单个目标时，伦特会使用连击，以无情的爪击猛攻迅速压制对方，并通过放血者天赋造成额外的流血伤害。

队伍无法指望在近战中承受这轮猛攻，因此必须仔细思考该如何拖慢科伊·伦特。

晋升

当科伊·伦特被击败时，战斗结束。观众对队伍的表演感到满意，解说员宣布队伍将在明天回归参加另一场比赛。

队伍获得一次休息机会，可以使用恢复动作，并提升1级，晋升至5级。所有英雄还可以将其已装备护甲的品质提升至精制。队伍将在第二天返回，面对@UUID[.sISxZXCLNvpjkY02]{第五天 - 虚空先驱者}。

In this fourth challenge, 4 level 4 heroes square off against the lycanthropic menace Koy Rent.

  • @UUID[Actor.3sGYsiKtgYLLkadw]{Koy Rent} (Level 7 Boss)

Protagonist Threat: 4 × 4 = 16

Adversary Threat: 14

Encounter Difficulty: Difficult

Introduction

For this challenge, the party assembles on the east side of the Arena.

"Today's match is a special one- featuring the return of a retired champion in a one-day-only exhibition! Folks, you know him, you love him, he's here, he's there, he is EV-ERY-WHERE!--- Koy Rent! Rent left the ring after a grievous injury, cheered off the field of victory by an understanding crowd. With him back in the games we have to wonder: will he climb to champion or will he fall to these new contenders?"

Koy Rent enters the arena from the West entrance and immediately attacks!

Tactics

Koy Rent is a formidable fighter. As a Level 7 Boss with significant Health and Morale pools, the party will have little hope of withstanding his onslaught in direct melee combat.

Rent will use Ferocious Howl to inflict the Frightened condition and move quickly to close distance into melee range with as many enemies as possible. Rent will use Flurry when facing a single target to subdue them quickly with a relentless onslaught of claw attacks, dealing additional bleeding damage through the Bloodletter talent.

The party cannot hope to withstand this onslaught in melee combat and will need to think carefully about how to slow Koy Rent down.

Advancement

The fight ends when Koy Rent is defeated. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

The party is given a chance to rest, use the Recover action, and gain a level; advancing to Level 5. All heroes may also increase the quality of their equipped Armor to Fine. The party returns the next day to face @UUID[.sISxZXCLNvpjkY02]{Day Five - Void Harbingers}.

Day Five - Void Harbingers.name: 第5天 - 虚空先驱者 Day Five - Void Harbingers
Day Five - Void Harbingers.text:
在这项挑战中，4名5级英雄将对阵三名虚空先驱者：

  • @UUID[Actor.YVvIKp7fUIduZchE]{恐惧先驱}（4级精英）

  • @UUID[Actor.TZT7ybsmI8yV5hWg]{疫病先驱}（4级精英）

  • @UUID[Actor.CTpEm0WlmFAAosBD]{疯狂先驱}（4级精英）

主角威胁：4 × 5 = 20

对手威胁：3 × 6 = 18

遭遇难度：致命

引言

“今晚，我们将迎来真正令人兴奋的场面！召唤师们从暗影帷幕彼端的领域中 conjured 出了全新的挑战！女士们，先生们，从现实边缘之外最黑暗的深处与阈限空间而来，欢迎来到英勇之戒：虚空先驱者！”

战术

恐惧先驱是一名以恐惧思绪为食的机动型掠食者。它会使用以太扭曲在战场上自由穿梭，并用Eldritch Emanataion让成群的敌人陷入恐惧。一旦它孤立出一名处于恐慌状态的敌人，就会用它的灵能巨口进行打击。

疫病先驱是瘟疫的传播者，能够用它的疫病鞭笞能力施加染病状态。这名先驱者也拥有施法能力，它会借此进一步蚕食生命与士气，使用Pulse手势来针对成群的敌人，或使用Influence针对单个目标。

疯狂先驱是一名精神层面的掠食者，它会先逼近至近战范围，然后对成群的敌人使用精神鞭笞能力，或对单个敌人使用Devour Thoughts。

晋升

当三名先驱者全部被击败时，战斗结束。观众对队伍的表演很满意，解说员宣布队伍将在明天回归，参加另一场比赛。

队伍将获得一次休整机会，可以使用恢复动作，并提升1级；晋升至6级。所有英雄还可以将其已装备护甲的品质提升至精良。队伍将在次日返回，对阵 @UUID[.UxIXSvvJCdqx2Tar]{第六天 - 镜像对决}。

In this challenge, 4 Level 5 heroes face off against a trio of Void Harbingers:

  • @UUID[Actor.YVvIKp7fUIduZchE]{Harbinger of Fear} (L4 Elite)

  • @UUID[Actor.TZT7ybsmI8yV5hWg]{Harbinger of Disease} (L4 Elite)

  • @UUID[Actor.CTpEm0WlmFAAosBD]{Harbinger of Madness} (L4 Elite)

Protagonist Threat: 4 × 5 = 20

Adversary Threat: 3 × 6 = 18

Encounter Difficulty: Deadly

Introduction

"Tonight we're in for some true excitement as the summoners have conjured a new challenge from realms beyond the umbral veil! Ladies and gentlemen, from the darkest recesses and liminal spaces beyond the edge of reality, welcome to the Ring of Valor: the Void Harbingers!"

Tactics

The Harbinger of Fear is a mobile predator that feasts on fearful thoughts. It will use Ethereal Warp to move freely about the battlefield and Eldritch Emanataion to inflict fear on groups of enemies. Once it has isolated a frightened enemy it will Strike with it's Psychic Maw.

The Harbinger of Disease is a bearer of pestilence that inflicts the Diseased condition using it's Pestilent Lash ability. This Harbinger also has spellcasting ability which it will use to further sap life and morale, targeting groups of enemies with the Pulse gesture or individual targets using Influence.

The Harbinger of Madness is a psychological predator which will close to melee range before using the Mind Flay ability against groups of enemies or Devour Thoughts against a single foe.

Advancement

The fight ends when all three Harbingers are defeated. The crowd is pleased with the party's performance, and the Commentator announces that the party will be returning tomorrow for another match.

The party is given a chance to rest, use the Recover action, and gain a level; advancing to Level 6. All heroes may also increase the quality of their equipped Armor to Fine. The party returns the next day to face @UUID[.UxIXSvvJCdqx2Tar]{Day Six - Mirror Match}.

Day Six - Mirror Match.name: 第六天——镜像对决 Day Six - Mirror Match
Day Six - Mirror Match.text:
在这场最终挑战中，4名6级英雄将与一支由4名6级英雄组成的敌对冒险小队正面交锋。

  • @UUID[Actor.iLUfMcYjAbZFY4CJ]{Duurath}（6级）

  • @UUID[Actor.0crVYYsPvV9KDEJ2]{Belladonna}（6级）

  • @UUID[Actor.2lvTCCOj4dnBI774]{Eliorwen}（6级）

  • @UUID[Actor.Il4NDaNBdHNcjJ9d]{Kagura}（6级）

主角威胁：4 × 6 = 24

对手威胁：4 × 6 = 24

遭遇难度：致命

引言

“好啊，好啊……你们的斗士已经证明了自己，战胜了这座竞技场所能提供的一切强大对手，那么现在，是时候让他们与往届比赛中那些声名显赫的老兵与冠军一较高下了。准备迎接一场冠军之间的战斗吧！”

这是一项格外困难的挑战，因为对方四名英雄个个都经过独立优化，而且彼此配合默契。

战术

本挑战中的每个对手都作为英雄级主角运作，拥有各自的一整套天赋、动作和装备。

Duurath

Duurath 是一名危险的近战战斗者，拥有很高的交战、强大的物理防御，以及会使敌人丧失斗志并陷入恐惧的恐惧领主签名天赋。Duurath会使用盾牌冲锋逼近敌方战斗者，并以Cadence将其牵制以造成高额伤害，或在格挡来袭打击时用反击进行报复。在防御方面，Duurath可以使用Kinetic Ward来保护自己免受所选类型的物理伤害。

Belladonna

Belladonna是一名狡诈而难以捉摸的近战战斗者，拥有Poisoner天赋。战斗开始时，她会启动毒刃。她会对敌方施法者使用Distract来消耗他们的专注，并用战斗医疗恢复盟友的生命值。Belladonna会寻找更脆弱的敌方战斗者，必要时使用Tumble 贴近至近战距离，并以Flurry快速施加伤害和中毒状态。

Eliorwen

Eliorwen是一名致命的弓箭手，借助她的奥术弓手天赋，将闪电法术灌注进长弓射出的箭矢。Eliorwen会识别出危险的敌人，并以Mark Prey将其标记，从而为自己和盟友削弱其防御。她会使用精准射击，配合消耗降低的Voltaic Arrow，从远处持续稳定地造成伤害。

Kagura

Kagura是一名多用的支援角色，能够治疗盟友的身心。她会施放Life符文，并使用Influence、Pulse或Ray手势之一，以触发其Mender天赋带来的额外治疗。Kagura还可以通过审慎运用Compose屈折以及节省精力，几乎无限期地维持治疗。Kagura会避免直接对抗，转而脱离战斗并寻求盟友的保护。

晋升

当四名对手全部被击败时，战斗结束。观众会为队伍的表演而欢呼，将他们颂扬为英勇之戒的永恒冠军。目前英勇之戒已没有更多预定活动，但如果你希望继续测试、即兴设计新的挑战让队伍面对，请参见 @UUID[.aNlzMnfUkwpLrSox]{Further Challenges}。

In this final challenge, 4 Level 6 heroes come head-to-head with a rival adventuring party comprised of 4 Level 6 heroes.

  • @UUID[Actor.iLUfMcYjAbZFY4CJ]{Duurath} (Level 6)

  • @UUID[Actor.0crVYYsPvV9KDEJ2]{Belladonna} (Level 6)

  • @UUID[Actor.2lvTCCOj4dnBI774]{Eliorwen} (Level 6)

  • @UUID[Actor.Il4NDaNBdHNcjJ9d]{Kagura} (Level 6)

Protagonist Threat: 4 × 6 = 24

Adversary Threat: 4 × 6 = 24

Encounter Difficulty: Deadly

Introduction

"Well, well… your champions have proven themselves against all of the formidable adversaries which this arena had to offer, so it's time to pit them against the storied veterans and champions of a past competition. Prepare yourselves for a battle of champions!"

This is an especially difficult challenge because all four opposing heroes are individually optimized and work well as a team.

Tactics

Each of the opponents in this challenge functions as a heroic protagonist with their own array of talents, actions, and equipment.

Duurath

Duurath is a dangerous melee combatant with high Engagement, strong physical defense, and the Dread Lord signature talent which demoralizes and frightens foes. Duurath will close on enemy combatants using Shield Charge and lock them down using Cadence to deliver high damage or Counter Strike to retaliate when blocking incoming blows. Defensively, Duurath can use Kinetic Ward to protect himself from a chosen type of physical damage.

Belladonna

Belladonna is a cunning and elusive melee combatant with the Poisoner talent. At the beginning of the battle she will activate Poison Blades. She will use Distract against enemy spellcasters to sap their Focus, and Combat Medicine to restore the health of her allies. Belladonna will seek out more vulnerable enemy combatants, closing to melee range using Tumble if necessary and Flurry to apply rapid damage and poisoned conditions.

Eliorwen

Eliorwen is a deadly archer, infusing shots from her Longbow with lightning spells using her Arcane Archer talent. Eliorwen will identify a dangerous enemy and target them with Mark Prey to reduce their defenses for herself and her allies. She will use Precision Shot coupled with reduced cost Voltaic Arrow to deliver reliable sustained damage from a distance.

Kagura

Kagura is a versatile support character able to heal both mind and body of her allies. She will cast the Life rune using either the Influence, Pulse, or Ray gestures to trigger additional healing from her Mender talent. Kagura can sustain healing nearly indefinitely through thoughtful use of the Compose inflection as well as Conserve Effort. Kagura avoids direct confrontation and instead will disengage from combat and seek protection from her allies.

Advancement

The fight ends when all four adversaries are defeated. The crowd is thrilled with the party's performance and celebrates them as eternal champions of the Ring of Valor. There are not any more planned events in the Ring of Valor at this time, but please see @UUID[.aNlzMnfUkwpLrSox]{Further Challenges} if you wish to continue testing by improvising new challenges for the party to face.

Further Challenges.name: 进一步的挑战 Further Challenges
Further Challenges.text:
感谢你完成了Crucible 试玩测试。我们希望你和你的玩家都享受了这次测试体验。为了进一步挑战并评估这个系统，我们推荐以下内容：

  1. 重复进行 @UUID[.UxIXSvvJCdqx2Tar]{第六天 - 镜像对决} 挑战，但改用不同组合的6级预生成人物作为对手。

  2. 通过测试分类法和原型的初始系统，创建你自己的 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.v1dqTT3NI35lFNxM]{对手}。

也请考虑花一些时间 @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.5SgXrAKS2EnqVggJ.JournalEntryPage.4Ggutuh9uzhcEXSK]{提供反馈}，这将帮助我们进一步开发并改进这个新的角色扮演游戏系统。

Thank you for completing the Crucible Playtest. We hope that you and your players enjoyed the testing experience. For further challenges to evaluate the system, we recommend the following:

  1. Repeat the @UUID[.UxIXSvvJCdqx2Tar]{Day Six - Mirror Match} challenge but with different combinations of Level 6 Pregen characters as adversaries.

  2. Create your own @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.v1dqTT3NI35lFNxM]{Adversaries} by testing out the initial system of Taxonomies and Archetypes.

Please consider taking the time to @UUID[Compendium.crucible.rules.JournalEntry.5SgXrAKS2EnqVggJ.JournalEntryPage.4Ggutuh9uzhcEXSK]{Provide Feedback} which can help us further develop and improve this new role-playing game system.

archetype.name: 长牙兽 Tusker
archetype.description:
使用自身的体重、冲势和锋利獠牙战斗的野兽。

Beasts that fight using their own mass, momentum, and sharpened tusks.

taxonomy.name: 野猪 Boar
taxonomy.description:
拥有厚皮、危险獠牙，以及强力的低重心的哺乳动物。

Mammals with thick hide, dangerous tusks, and a powerful low-seated center of mass.

Tusk Charge.name: 獠牙冲锋 Tusk Charge
Tusk Charge.description:
那头野猪低下头，以疯狂的速度冲来，流着口水的喉咙下方突出了獠牙。
The Boar lowers its head and charges with frantic speed, it's tusks protruding from beneath a drooling gullet.

tuskCharge.name: 獠牙冲锋 Tusk Charge
tuskCharge.description:
沿直线冲锋，距离至多等同于你的步幅，并对你遭遇的第一个生物进行一次打击。若成功，目标被击倒地。

Charge in a direct line up to your Stride and make a Strike against the first creature you encounter. If successful, the target is knocked Prone.

archetype.name: 群体成员 Pack Member
archetype.description:
成群狩猎的野兽。
Beasts that hunt in packs.

taxonomy.name: 鬣狗 Hyena
taxonomy.description:
鬣狗科的哺乳动物。鬣狗是食肉的群猎者，拥有强壮的颈部和下颚。
Mammals from the hyena family. Hyenas are carnivorous pack hunters with powerful necks and jaws.

Pack Hunter.name: 群猎者 Pack Hunter
Pack Hunter.description:
这种生物是群猎者，会依靠盟友对目标进行夹击和骚扰，使其暴露于进一步伤害之下。

该生物在攻击被夹击的敌人时，获得的恩惠数量加倍。

This creature is a pack hunter, relying on its allies to flank and harrass a target to render it exposed to further harm.

This creature doubles number of Boons awarded from attacking a Flanked enemy.

archetype.name: 擒抱者 Grappler
archetype.description:
专精于以身体压制对手并使其更易受到后续攻击的战士。
Fighters who specialize in physically restraining their adversaries and rendering them susceptible to further attacks.

taxonomy.name: 食人魔 Ogre
taxonomy.description:
以蛮力和直截了当的解决问题方式而闻名的魁梧巨人裔。

Hulking giantkin which are reknowned for their brute strength and direct problem-solving approach.

description.public:
由大型野兽或怪物的坚韧皮革制成，这些结实的护甲由猎人和荒野居民穿戴，在野外提供耐用但粗糙的防御。

Toughened skins from large beasts or monsters, these rugged armors are worn by hunters and wildfolk, offering durable—but crude—defense in the field.

巨棒是一段扭曲的重型木料，有时还钉着铁钉；这种武器虽然粗陋，却令人畏惧，即使在未受训者手中也同样危险。

A gnarled length of heavy wood, sometimes studded with iron, the greatclub is a crude but fearsome weapon is dangerous even in untrained hands.

Powerful Physique.name: 强健体魄 Powerful Physique
Powerful Physique.description:
你可以挥舞带有缓慢特质的武器，并穿戴带有笨重特质的护甲，而不会在你的先攻掷骰上承受祸骰。
You can wield weapons with the Slow trait and wear Armor with the Bulky trait without suffering Banes to your Initiative rolls.

Leg Sweep.name: 扫腿 Leg Sweep
Leg Sweep.description:
你用一把依据力量成长的武器横扫敌人，使其失去平衡，低身挥击将其从脚下击倒。

You use a weapon which scales using Strength to sweep your enemy off balance, swinging low to knock them from their feet.

legSweep.name: 扫腿 Leg Sweep
legSweep.description:
你用你的主手武器进行一次打击攻击。这个技巧很困难施展，且造成的伤害减少，但如果成功，则会使你的目标倒地。

You make a Strike attack with your mainhand weapon. This technique is Difficult to execute and deals reduced damage, but if successful renders your target Prone.

Concussive Blows.name: 震荡重击 Concussive Blows
Concussive Blows.description:
你运用造成钝击伤害的近战武器所施展的肉体力量，在对生命值造成伤害的暴击时，可以造成踉跄状态。

踉跄效果持续 1 轮，并使目标的最大动作减少 1。

Your physical power wielding melee weapons which deal Bludgeoning damage can cause the Staggered condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The Staggered effect lasts for 1 round and reduces your target's maximum Action by 1.

Strong Grip.name: 强力握持 Strong Grip
Strong Grip.description:
你对自己武器装备的掌控稳固而不容撼动。你可以在持用双手持用武器时，执行需要空出一只手的动作。试图缴械你时，会获得+2祸骰。
Your grasp of your weaponry is firm and unyielding. You can perform Actions which require a free hand while wielding a two-handed weapon. Attempts to Disarm you are made with +2 Banes.

Hammer Toss.name: 锤子投掷 Hammer Toss
Hammer Toss.description:
铁砧抓住锤子，将兽人一头猛掷进混战之中。
Anvil grabs Hammer and hurls the Orc headlong into the fray.

hammerToss.name: 锤子投掷 Hammer Toss
hammerToss.description:
锤子抓取铁砧，并将他猛掷至多 10 格；兽人战酋落地处的效果区域内会造成伤害。

Hammer grabs Anvil and hurls him up to 10 spaces, dealing damage in an area of effect where the Orc warchief lands.
hammerToss.condition:
锤子邻接于铁砧。
Hammer is adjacent to Anvil.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: 重型武器训练 Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何使用重型武器打出沉重的攻击，在每一次挥击中都倾注全身的力量。你对所有重型和平衡类别的武器均为受训。

You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: 强力打击 Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description:
你用主手武器施展一次强力打击。这次攻击施展起来较为缓慢，但经过强化，可造成额外伤害。

You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Unarmed Combat Training.name: 徒手战斗训练 Unarmed Combat Training
Unarmed Combat Training.description:
你熟悉基础武术和徒手战斗。你知道如何运用自身的体魄力量制服或压制对手。你在徒手武器类别上处于受训等级。

You are familiar with basic martial arts and hand-to-hand combat. You know how to subdue or restrain opponents using your physical Strength. You are Trained with weapons in the Unarmed category.

grapple.name: 擒抱 Grapple
grapple.description:
你尝试在身体上限制或制服一个对手。对一个相邻目标进行一次运动技能攻击。若成功，你和你的目标都会陷入 @Condition[restrained] 状态，持续 1 轮。

You attempt to physically restrain or subdue an opponent. Perform a Athletics skill attack against an adjacent target. If successful, both you and your target are @Condition[restrained] for 1 Round.

archetype.name: 散兵 Skirmisher
archetype.description:
一名无情而坚定的近战战士，运用敏捷与力量的结合来制服敌人。
A relentless and determined melee combatant that uses a mix of agility and power to subdue foes.

taxonomy.name: 兽人语 Orcish
taxonomy.description:
你的出生被一个骄傲而坚韧民族的星象与传统所铭刻。你高大且匀称的身躯，以及天生坚韧的倾向，起源于一个暴露在严酷北方气候无情磨砺之中的民族。你的族人首先以力量与韧性闻名。

Your birth was marked by the stars and traditions of a proud and enduring people. Your tall and well-toned body and natural propensity for toughness has origins amid a people exposed to the relentless struggle of a harsh northern clime. Your people are known for their strength and resilience above all else.

description.public:
手斧紧凑且致命，是一种单手劈砍武器，柄短刃利，非常适合投掷或在近距离打击中使用，此时速度胜过延伸。

Compact and deadly, the hand axe is a one-handed chopper with a short haft and sharp blade, ideal for throwing or close-quarters strikes where speed outmatches reach.

缝制或铆接在皮革或布料衬底上的重叠金属片，鳞甲形似巨龙的鳞皮，能很好地防御劈砍和刺击——不过它既吵闹又不灵活。

Overlapping metal plates sewn or riveted onto a leather or cloth backing, scale mail resembles the hide of a dragon and protects well against cuts and stabs—though it's noisy and inflexible.

Skirmisher.name: 散兵 Skirmisher
Skirmisher.description:
你擅长进出混战。当你移出敌人的交战半径时，该敌人对你进行的任何脱离交战打击都会获得 2 个祸骰。

You are adept at entering and exiting the fray. When moving out of the Engagement radius of an enemy, that enemy has 2 Banes to any Disengagement Strike against you.

Flurry.name: 连击 Flurry
Flurry.description:
一种使用两把武器，以连绵不绝的攻击序列压制单一目标的武艺技巧。

A martial technique using two weapons to overwhelm a single target with a relentless sequence of attacks.

flurry.name: 连击 Flurry
flurry.description:
你用每把武器各打击两次，但每次打击都是困难的。

You Strike twice with each weapon, but each strike is Difficult.

Hamstring.name: 断筋打击 Hamstring
Hamstring.description:
你使用一把挥砍武器攻击敌人的腿部，使其移动受阻。

You use a slashing weapon to target the legs of an enemy and cripple their movement.

hamstring.name: 断筋打击 Hamstring
hamstring.description:
你进行一次打击攻击，此次攻击为困难，但若成功，则施加迟缓状态，持续3轮。

You make Strike attack which is Difficult, but if successful, inflicts the Slowed condition for 3 Rounds.

Heavy Weapon Training.name: 重型武器训练 Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何运用重型武器施展沉重打击，在每一次挥击中倾注全部力量。你对所有属于重型和平衡类别的武器均为受训。

You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: 强力打击 Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description:
你用主手武器使出一次强力打击。这次攻击施展起来较为缓慢，但经过强化，可造成额外伤害。

You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Dual Wield.name: 双持 Dual Wield
Dual Wield.description:
你擅长同时使用两把武器战斗。你可以将攻击交织起来，以比使用单一武器更快的速度进行打击。

You are adept at fighting with two weapons simultaneously. You can weave attacks together to strike more rapidly than possible with a single weapon.

offhandStrike.name: 副手攻击 Offhand Strike
offhandStrike.description:
在你用主手武器进行一次基础打击后，你立刻用副手武器进行一次减耗的后续打击。

Immediately after you perform a basic Strike with your mainhand weapon, you make a reduced-cost fullow-up Strike with your offhand weapon.

description.public:
手半剑，又称“一手半剑”，是一种多用武器，配有一把约40英寸长的笔直双刃剑刃。此武器经过锻造，兼顾单手持用的灵活性与双手持用的威力。

A bastard sword, also known as a hand-and-a-half sword, is a versatile weapon with a straight, double-edged blade around 40 inches long. This weapon is forged for both single-handed agility and two-handed power.

archetype.name: 秘学家 Occultist
archetype.description:
运用异界与诡秘力量进行施法的魔法使用者。
Magic users who practice spellcraft using otherworldly and eldritch forces.

taxonomy.name: 人类 Human
taxonomy.description:
在无数状态与遥远各地之间，你生来就是一个始终善于适应的人类。无论高矮、胖瘦、健壮或圆润，你的外表若说有什么特点，那就是多种多样。人类最为人所知的是其基因中对决心的倾向，而他们的传统则推动着一种顽强求生的意志。

Found amid countless conditions and far-flung places, you were born an ever-adaptable human. Tall or short, thin, muscular, or rotund, your physical appearance is nothing if not varied. Humans are most known for a genetic predisposition toward determination, with traditions that drive a stubborn will to survive.

description.public:
这件阴森的护符会唤起恐惧与死亡的能量，以辅助施法或以腐化影响折磨敌人。

This macabre talisman invokes the fear and energies of death to aid spellcaft or afflict enemies with corrupting influence.

Studded Leather Armor.name: 镶钉皮甲 Studded Leather Armor

description.public:
以皮革为底，并以小型金属饰钉或铆接金属片加固，这种护甲在机动性与对劈砍伤害的适度保护之间取得了平衡。

A base of leather reinforced with small metal studs or riveted plates, this armor strikes a balance between mobility and modest protection against slashes.

Gesture: Influence.name: 手势：影响 Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
你将符文的奥术力量强化为一种集中的直接接触，这通常是基础触碰手势的更强力进阶形式。

影响手势使用Presence进行成长，并以一个相邻的单个生物为目标。它会对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成10 基础伤害。此手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Inflection: Compose.name: 屈折：作曲 Inflection: Compose
Inflection: Compose.description:
通过在法术形成过程中花费额外时间来强化法术，以此换取降低其他资源消耗。Compose屈折使法术的专注消耗减少 1，作为交换，其动作消耗增加 1。

Enhance a spell by taking extra time in its formation, reducing other resource costs in exchange. The Compose inflection reduces the Focus cost of a spell by 1 while increasing its Action cost by 1 in exchange.

Gesture: Create.name: 手势：创造 Gesture: Create
Gesture: Create.description:
你将奥术能量凝聚为有形之物，显化出一个精灵，它会出现在10英尺内并以先攻1加入战斗。你的精灵是一个仆从，等级为你自身等级的一半。

创造手势基于感知进行缩放，且该精灵会存活6轮。你同时只能拥有一个处于激活状态的精灵；若施放另一个使用创造手势的法术，则会替换你之前的精灵。此手势需要2只手施放，基础消耗为4动作和1专注。

试玩测试说明

并非所有符文都已定义精灵执行体。尚未定义创造内容的符文目前会显化出一个火焰精灵。

You coalesce arcane power into tangible form, manifesting a Sprite which appears within 10 feet and joins Combat at Initiative 1. Your Sprite is a Minion of half your own Level.

The Create gesture scales with Wisdom and the Sprite survives for 6 Rounds. You may only have one active Sprite, casting another spell using the Create gesture replaces your previous Sprite. This gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Playtest Notes

Not all Runes have a Sprite actor defined yet. Runes that do not yet have a defined Creation will — for now — manifest a Flame Sprite.

Gesture: Arrow.name: 手势：箭头 Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
你向远处的目标投出一枚灌注了符文魔法力量的投射物。

箭矢手势使用智力进行成长，并以60英尺内的单个生物为目标；未能抵抗该法术的目标会受到8基础伤害。施放该手势需要1只手，其基础消耗为3动作和1专注。

You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Conjurer.name: 召唤师 Conjurer
Conjurer.description:
你是“咒法”学派以及“创造”手势的大师，能够将奥术能量显化为实体形态。你可以同时维持至多 3 个此类造物，而不再仅限于一个。

You are a master of Conjuration and the Gesture of Creation to manifest arcane energy as physical form. You can maintain up to 3 such creations simultaneously rather than only one.

Inflection: Push.name: 屈折：推开 Inflection: Push
Inflection: Push.description:
强化一个法术，使其将受影响的生物从施法者身边击退。受带有Push屈折的法术影响的生物会向远离施法者的方向移动4英尺，前提是该目的地未被占据。

Empower a spell to repel affected creatures away from the caster. Creatures affected by a spell with the Push inflection move 4 feet away from the spellcaster if that destination is unoccupied.

Talisman Weapon Training.name: 护符武器训练 Talisman Weapon Training
Talisman Weapon Training.description:
你了解如何运用护符、法珠、法器或其他类似器具来引导魔法或强化施法。你在护符类别的武器上为受训。

You understand the arcane usage of talismans, orbs, foci, or other similar implements to channel magic or empower spellcraft. You are Trained with weapons in the Talisman categories.

refocus.name: 重新聚焦 Refocus
refocus.description:
你使用你已装备的护符来尝试重新获得一些专注。你对自己的Rallying阈值进行一次无害的打击。

成功时，若使用单手护符则恢复+1 专注，若使用双手持用护符则恢复+2 专注。若为大成功，恢复的专注量额外增加 +1。

You use your equipped Talisman to attempt to regain some Focus. You perform a Harmless Strike against your own Rallying threshold.

On a success you recover +1 Focus if using a one-handed Talisman and +2 Focus if using a two-handed Talisman. On a critical success the amount of Focus recovered increases by an additional +1.

Intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
Intercept.description:
你保护你的盟友，拦截那些原本可能会落在同伴身上的攻击。
You protect your allies, intercepting blows that might otherwise be directed towards your companions.

intercept.name: 拦截 Intercept
intercept.description:
你拦截进入你交战半径内的敌人的路径，立即进行至多等同于你步幅的移动，以挡在其前方并阻挡其路线。

如果该敌人在其回合中移出你的交战半径，或攻击任何其他生物，你可以对其进行一次脱离打击。

You intercept the path of an enemy which enters your Engagement radius, immediatly moving up to your Stride to interpose yourself and block their path.

If the enemy moves out of your Engagement radius or attacks any other creature during their turn, you may make a Disengagement Strike against them.
intercept.condition:
一个敌人移动进入或穿过你的交战半径。
An enemy moves into or through your Engagement radius.

Gesture: Ray.name: 手势：射线 Gesture: Ray
Gesture: Ray.description:
你将符文的奥术力量汇聚于一点，并将其以一道光束向外投射。

Ray 手势使用感知进行缩放，并产生一条由施法者发出、1英尺宽、30英尺长的线，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成6基础伤害。该手势需要1只手来施放，基础消耗为4动作和1专注。

You funnel the arcane power of a Rune into a point and project it outwards in a beam.

The Ray gesture scales using Wisdom and produces a line that is 1 foot wide and 30 feet long originating from the spellcaster, dealing 6 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 4 Action and 1 Focus.

Rune: Oblivion.name: 符文：湮灭 Rune: Oblivion
Rune: Oblivion.description:
一种混乱的毁灭力量，能够湮灭存在。湮灭符文掌管物质的消解或灵魂的涣散。

湮灭符文以Intellect进行成长，目标为意志，并对士气造成Void伤害。它与秩序的灵魂符文相对立。

A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

erase.name: 擦除 Erase
erase.description:
你对湮灭符文的掌控使你能够解开存在结构中的微小孔洞，产生以下效果之一：

  • 分解一个你手持的、尺寸小于 6 英寸立方体的非魔法物体，将其粉碎为由其组成元素构成的细微粉尘。

  • 麻痹你自己或你触碰到的一个自愿目标感受情绪的能力，使其进入平静、坚忍或冷漠的状态。只要你不再进行进一步的动作，此效果即可维持。

  • 压制一个光源的强度，使其可见半径减半，只要你持续与其保持物理接触即可。任意时刻只能以这种方式减弱一个光源。

擦除只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Soul.name: 符文：灵魂 Rune: Soul
Rune: Soul.description:
一种有序的创造与精神本质之力。灵魂符文掌管灵魂在生命与死亡间的基本流转，并与知性、人格和心理健康等事务相关。

灵魂符文以 Presence 进行成长，提供 Restoration 以恢复 士气，或造成由 意志 对抗的 Psychic 伤害。它与混沌的 湮灭 符文相对。

An orderly force of creation and spiritual essence. The Soul rune governs the fundamental procession of souls through life and death and relates to matters of sapience, personality, and mental health.

The Soul rune scales using Presence and provides Restoration of Morale or inflicts Psychic damage opposed by Willpower. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Oblivion.

evoke.name: 引发 Evoke
evoke.description:
你对灵魂符文的掌控使你能够促成基础形式的灵性影响，产生以下效果之一：

  • 使你自己或另一名自愿的人重温其过去某一时刻的一段核心记忆，其持续时间最长为一分钟，如同最近才发生一般。

  • 鉴定影响某人的一种负面灵性状态，例如 @Condition[broken]、@Condition[frightened]、@Condition[confused] 或 @Condition[insane]。

  • 与另一名自愿的生物建立短暂的灵性连接，使其能够领会一个可以用单个词语表达的想法。

引发的用途只能影响你自己或另一名你能够以身体接触到的生物。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Soul allows you to facilitate basic forms of spiritual influence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Enable yourself or another willing person to revisit a core memory of a moment from their past up to one minute in duration as if it happened recently.

  • Identify a negative spiritual condition that is affecting a person such as @Condition[broken], @Condition[frightened], @Condition[confused], or @Condition[insane].

  • Create a momentary spiritual connection with another willing creature that allows them to recognize an idea which can be expressed as a single word.

Uses of Evoke may only affect yourself or another creature which you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Death.name: 符文：死亡 Rune: Death
Rune: Death.description:
有序的毁灭之力，负责腐化一切生物材料。死亡符文掌管衰朽与毁灭。

死亡符文以Presence进行成长，目标为坚韧，并对生命值造成Corruption伤害。它与混沌的生命符文相对立。

The orderly force of destruction, responsible for the corruption of all biological matter. The Death rune governs decay and destruction.

The Death rune scales using Presence, targets Fortitude, and deals Corruption damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Life.

ennervate.name: 失神术 Ennervate
ennervate.description:
你对死亡符文的掌控使你能够与死者进行基础交流，并对亵渎之力进行初步操纵，从而产生以下效果之一：

  • 让一个不大于1立方英尺的物体蔓延腐朽，使植物枯萎、金属物体生锈、木头腐烂、食物变质，或令一具尸体迅速分解。魔法物品通常不受影响。

  • 使一具死亡未满七天或经由其他方式保存的尸体，机械地重演其生命最后时刻的情景。它的移动会模仿该生物生命最后30秒内发生的动作。你无法控制该生物，它也不能以任何其他方式进行交流。

  • 加速一名当前处于濒死状态且自愿的生物的死亡，使其迅速而安详地逝去。

失神术只能影响你能够以身体直接触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人决定。

Your command of the Rune of Death allows for basic communion with the dead and for rudimentary manipulation of unholy forces, producing one of the following effects:

  • Spread decay over an object no larger than a 1-foot cube, causing plants to wither, metallic objects to rust, wood to become rotten, food to grow foul, or a corpse to rapidly decompose. Magical objects are typically unaffected.

  • Cause a corpse which has been dead for less than seven days or otherwise preserved to perform a lifeless reenactment of its final moments. Its movements imitate those that occurred during the creature's final 30 seconds of life. You have no control over the creature nor can it communicate in any other way.

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

description.public:
这本厚重的巨册既可用作知识的储存库，也可作为施法的法器。持于奥术施法者手中时，它能够向目标射出震荡性的力场冲击。

This heavy tome is used as a repository of knowledge as well as an implement for spellcraft. In the hands of an arcane practitioner, it can project concussive blasts of force towards a target.

archetype.name: 弓箭手 Archer
archetype.description:
接受过训练的远程战斗人员会使用弓箭。
Ranged combatants with training is the use of bows.

taxonomy.name: 骷髅 Skeleton
taxonomy.description:
由骨骼与筋腱构成的不死居民。

Undeathly denizens fashioned of bone and sinew.

description.public:
短弓紧凑且便于快速抽出，擅长快速的近距离射箭和小规模冲突，深受侦察兵、猎人和步伐敏捷的袭击者青睐。

Compact and quick to draw, the shortbow excels in rapid, close-quarters archery and skirmishes, favored by scouts, hunters, and swift-footed raiders.

Precision Shot.name: 精准射击 Precision Shot
Precision Shot.description:
你花时间稳住瞄准，锁定敌人最薄弱的部位。你或许只有一次出手机会，但你会让这一击发挥作用。
You take time to steady your aim and target the weakest point of a foe. You may only get one shot, but you make it count.

precisionShot.name: 精准射击 Precision Shot
precisionShot.description:
你稳住瞄准，射出精准的一击。

You steady your aim and fire a single accurate shot.

Evasive Shot.name: 闪避射击 Evasive Shot
Evasive Shot.description:
你是精于在闪避敌人攻击的同时使用远程武器装备射击的专家。在进行一次远程武器攻击后，你获得额外的免费移动，距离为你步幅的一半。

You are an expert at firing shots with ranged weaponry while evading enemy attacks. After performing a ranged weapon attack, you gain half your Stride in additional free movement.

Projectile Weapon Training.name: 投射武器训练 Projectile Weapon Training
Projectile Weapon Training.description:
你接受过射箭及其他投射武器装备方面的基础训练。你在投射 类别的武器上不再被视为未受训。

You have a basic education in archery and other projectile weaponry. You are no longer treated as Untrained with weapons in the Projectile categories.

quickDraw.name: 快速拔取 Quick Draw
quickDraw.description:
即使在压力之下，你也可以射出一发子弹，尽管其精准度会下降。你进行一次打击，该打击为困难，但其动作成本会降低。

You can loose a shot under pressure, although with decreased accuracy. You perform a Strike that is Difficult, but has a reduced Action cost.

archetype.name: 战士 Fighter
archetype.description:
久经沙场的近战战士，精于挥使单手武器、盾牌和重型护甲。
Hardened melee combatants expert at weilding one-handed weaponry, shield, and heavy armor.

taxonomy.name: 骷髅 Skeleton
taxonomy.description:
由骨骼与筋腱构成的不死住民。

Undeathly denizens fashioned of bone and sinew.

description.public:
矛是一种兼具延伸与节奏感的武器，拥有一根前端包钢的长柄，非常适合坚守阵线，或从盾墙后方以致命的力量掷出。

A weapon of reach and rhythm, the spear features a long shaft tipped with steel, perfect for holding the line or launching with deadly force from behind a shield wall.

Bulwark.name: 壁垒 Bulwark
Bulwark.description:
你精通使用盾牌来保护自己和他人。

每回合一次，当你已装备盾牌时，你可以使用防御动作，且其消耗降低为 1 点动作点。

You have expertise in using a Shield to defend yourself and others.

Once per Turn while you have a Shield equipped, you may use the Defend action at a reduced cost of 1 Action Point.

Armored Efficiency.name: 装甲效率 Armored Efficiency
Armored Efficiency.description:
你受过训练，能够穿戴最重型的护甲，同时仍保有机动性。穿着重型护甲时，你每回合可以使用一次免费的移动动作。

You are trained in wearing the heaviest types of armor while still retaining mobility. You are able to use a free Movement action once per Turn while wearing Heavy armor.

Leg Sweep.name: 扫腿 Leg Sweep
Leg Sweep.description:
你使用一把以力量调整的武器横扫敌人，使其失去平衡，低挥一击将其从脚下扫倒。

You use a weapon which scales using Strength to sweep your enemy off balance, swinging low to knock them from their feet.

legSweep.name: 扫腿 Leg Sweep
legSweep.description:
你用主手武器进行一次打击攻击。此技巧很难施展，且造成的伤害减少，但若成功，则会使目标倒地。

You make a Strike attack with your mainhand weapon. This technique is Difficult to execute and deals reduced damage, but if successful renders your target Prone.

Light Weapon Training.name: 轻型武器训练 Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何以高度的机动性与优雅在战斗中流畅地挥舞轻型武器。你对轻型和平衡类别中的所有武器均为受训。

You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: 突刺 Lunge
lunge.description:
你灵巧地向前突进，以突然而出其不意的迅捷发起一次打击，使用一把具有灵巧特性的武器对单一目标进行一次打击，其攻击距离增加+2 feet。

此次攻击为困难，但你不会从当前位置移动，且此次攻击不会引发脱离接战。

You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a Finesse weapon against a single target with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

archetype.name: 狂战士 Berserker
archetype.description:
一名被狂怒驱动、偏好使用重型武器进行双手持用攻击的战士。
A rage-fueled warrior which prefers two-handed attacks using Heavy weapons.

taxonomy.name: 狼人 Werewolf
taxonomy.description:
以人形行走、却会化为狼形的兽化症变形者。

Lycanthropic shapeshifters who walk as men but take wolven form.

Thick Skin.name: 厚皮肤 Thick Skin
Thick Skin.description:
你的身体坚韧使你更能抵御伤害。你获得对钝击、挥砍和穿刺伤害的 +2 抗性。
Your physical toughness makes you more resistant to harm. You gain +2 Resistance to Bludgeoning, Slashing, and Piercing damage.

Ferocious Howl.name: 凶暴嚎叫 Ferocious Howl
Ferocious Howl.description:
狼人发出一声令人毛骨悚然的嚎叫，让你因恐惧而停下脚步。

The Werewolf lets out a blood-curdling howl that stops you in your tracks with fear.

ferociousHowl.name: 凶暴嚎叫 Ferocious Howl
ferociousHowl.description:
你对30英尺内所有敌人的意志防御进行一次威吓技能攻击，对其士气造成虚空伤害，并使其陷入恐慌状态，持续3轮。

You make an Intimidation skill attack against the Willpower defense of all enemies within 30 feet, dealing Void damage to Morale and causing the Frightened condition for 3 Rounds.

Intimidator.name: 威吓者 Intimidator
Intimidator.description:
你擅长以令人生畏的气势震慑敌人，击溃他们的士气。
You specialize in exerting your intimidating presence to break the morale of your foes.

intimidate.name: 威吓 Intimidate
intimidate.description:
你以肢体动作威吓一个处于你交战范围内的敌人，对你的目标进行一次威吓技能攻击。若成功，对方承受对士气造成的虚空伤害。

You physically intimidate an enemy that is within your engagement range, performing an Intimidation skill attack against your target. On a success they sustain Void damage to Morale.

Blood Frenzy.name: 嗜血狂乱 Blood Frenzy
Blood Frenzy.description:
你的战斗欲望激励你施展更为迅捷的壮举。当你造成一次对生命值造成伤害的暴击时，你立即获得 +1 动作。该收益每个回合仅可触发一次。

Your battle lust spurs you to feats of heightened action. When you achieve a Critical Hit that deals damage to Health you immediately gain +1 Action. This benefit may only happen once per Round.

Lesser Regeneration.name: 次级再生 Lesser Regeneration
Lesser Regeneration.description:
你惊人的强韧赋予你一种超自然的能力，使你能够从创伤中迅速恢复。在你的回合开始时，若你未处于虚弱状态，则获得+1 生命值。

Your prodigious hardiness conveys a supernatural capability to recover from wounds quickly. At the start of your turn if you are not Weakened you gain +1 Health.

Bloodletter.name: 放血者 Bloodletter
Bloodletter.description:
你对造成挥砍或穿刺伤害的武器的精准运用，能够在对生命值造成伤害的暴击时施加流血状态。

流血效果持续 1 轮，并将你的敏捷属性值作为对生命值造成的额外伤害。

Your precision with weapons which deal Slashing or Piercing damage can cause the Bleeding condition on Critical Hits which deal damage to Health.

The Bleeding effect lasts for 1 round and deals your Dexterity score as additional damage to Health.

Ferocious Leap.name: 凶猛飞跃 Ferocious Leap
Ferocious Leap.description:
你跃入战场，以主手武器对附近的一名敌人施以沉重一击。

You leap powerfully into battle to deliver a punishing blow to a nearby enemy with your mainhand weapon.

ferociousLeap.name: 凶猛飞跃 Ferocious Leap
ferociousLeap.description:
你跃击至多10尺，并对你落地点近战范围内的一名敌人进行一次打击。你的移动无视困难地形，且不会被敌方生物阻挡。

You leap up to 10 feet and perform a Strike against an enemy within melee range of where you land. Your movement ignores difficult terrain and is not blocked by enemy creatures.

Natural Weapon Proficiency.name: 天生武器熟练度 Natural Weapon Proficiency
Natural Weapon Proficiency.description:
你对天生肢体武器的运用相当娴熟。你获得熟练工训练等级，并在天生 类别的武器上获得+1技能加值。

You have a fluent familiarity with the use of natural bodily weapons. You gain the Journeyman training rank and a +1 Skill Bonus with weapons in the Natural category.

Berserker.name: 狂战士 Berserker
Berserker.description:
你沉醉于战斗的刺激之中，毫无顾忌地投身于混战。

You revel in the thrill of combat, hurling yourself into the fray with reckless abandon.

berserkerRage.name: 狂战士狂怒 Berserker Rage
berserkerRage.description:
你陷入激怒状态。处于激怒状态时，你的所有近战攻击都会额外造成 4 点伤害。你可以在自己的回合中进行一次意志检定，对抗 DC 20；若成功，则可尝试结束该效果。战斗结束时，该效果会自动结束。
You become Enraged. While Enraged you deal 4 additional damage on all melee attacks. You may attempt to end the effect on your own turn by succeeding on a Willpower test against a DC of 20. The effect ends automatically when Combat is concluded.
berserkerRage.condition:
自你在战斗中的上一回合以来，你的生命值池已经受到了伤害。
You have suffered damage to your Health pool since your last turn in Combat.

Frenzied Claws.name: 狂乱之爪 Frenzied Claws
Frenzied Claws.description:
@ref[actor.name]{该生物}用其爪发起一连串狂乱的胡乱挥击。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} launches into a frenzied sequence of wild swipes with its claws.

frenziedClaws.name: 狂乱之爪 Frenzied Claws
frenziedClaws.description:
该@ref[actor.name]{生物}用其爪对单一目标发动四次攻击。

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks four times with its claws against a single target.

Pouncing Strike.name: 猛扑打击 Pouncing Strike
Pouncing Strike.description:
这个生物向前突刺，将其整个重量都灌注于一次跳跃打击之中。

This creature lunges forward, putting its whole weight behind a leaping strike.

pouncingStrike.name: 猛扑打击 Pouncing Strike
pouncingStrike.description:
此次攻击可在一次移动后使用，前提是该生物因该次移动而至少接近其目标 10 英尺。若该生物原本位于目标上方，则此次攻击每因该次移动中的高度下降 10 英尺，便获得+1 恩惠。

如果此次攻击为重击，则该攻击的目标会立即陷入@Condition[prone]状态。

This attack may be used after a Move that brings the @ref[actor.name]{creature} at least 10 feet closer to its target. If the creature was above the target, this attack gains +1 Boon per 10 feet of elevation decrease in that movement.

If this attack is a Critical Hit, the target of the attack is immediately knocked @Condition[prone].

Heavy Weapon Training.name: 重型武器训练 Heavy Weapon Training
Heavy Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何使用重型武器施加沉重打击，在每一次挥击中都倾注你的全部力量。你获得所有重型和平衡类别武器的受训。

You know how to use a heavy weapon to deliver punishing blows, putting your entire strength behind every swing. You are Trained with all weapons in the Heavy and Balanced categories.

heavyStrike.name: 强力打击 Heavy Strike
heavyStrike.description:
你用主手武器施展一次强力打击。这次攻击出手较慢，但经过强化，会造成额外伤害。

You unleash a powerful Strike with your mainhand weapon. The attack is slower to execute, but is Empowered to deliver additional damage.

Harbinger of Disease.name: 疫病先驱 Harbinger of Disease
Harbinger of Disease.tokenName: 疫病先驱 Harbinger of Disease

archetype.name: 疫病使者 Plaguebearer
archetype.description:
带来瘟疫与腐朽之物。

Bringers of pestilence and decay.

taxonomy.name: 先驱者 Harbinger
taxonomy.description:
来自彼方虚空的异界存在。

Otherworldly beings from the void beyond.

description.public:
一些虚空几丁质的描述。

Some void chitin description.

Pestilent Lash.name: 疫病鞭笞 Pestilent Lash
Pestilent Lash.description:
先驱者用那条带有剧毒且满布疫病的舌头猛然横扫出一道宽阔的弧线。
The Harbinger lashes out in a wide arc with a venomous and disease-ridden tongue.

pestilentLash.name: 疫病鞭笞 Pestilent Lash
pestilentLash.description:
以120度弧形鞭击10尺内的所有敌人，命中时造成毒素伤害并施加染病状态。

Lash all enemies within 10 feet in a 120 degree arc, inflicting Poison damage and the Diseased condition on hit.

Gesture: Influence.name: 手势：影响 Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
你将符文的奥术力量强化为一种集中的直接接触，这通常是基础触碰手势的更强力演化。

影响手势基于Presence进行成长，并以一个相邻的单体生物为目标。它对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成10 基础伤害。此手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Gesture: Pulse.name: 手势：脉冲 Gesture: Pulse
Gesture: Pulse.description:
将一个符文的奥术力量驱逐出来，形成一个以你为中心、向外扩散的半径范围。

脉冲手势基于Presence进行缩放，并产生一个10英尺半径的散发区域，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。该手势需要2只手施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋当前位于一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时习得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而“提前”开放。

Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Inflection: Pull.name: 屈折：拉拽 Inflection: Pull
Inflection: Pull.description:
强化一个法术，使其将受影响的生物吸引向施法者。受带有“拉拽”屈折的法术影响的生物会向施法者移动1格，前提是该目标格未被占据。

Empower a spell to attract affected creatures toward the caster. Creatures affected by a spell with the Pull inflection move 1 space closer towards the spellcaster if that destination space is unoccupied.

Rune: Oblivion.name: 符文：湮灭 Rune: Oblivion
Rune: Oblivion.description:
一种混乱的、带来毁灭并将存在彻底湮灭的力量。湮灭符文主宰物质的消解或精神的涣散。

湮灭符文以Intellect进行成长，目标为意志，并对士气造成Void伤害。它与秩序井然的灵魂符文相对立。

A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

erase.name: 擦除 Erase
erase.description:
你对湮灭符文的掌控使你能够解开存在结构上的微小孔洞，产生以下效果之一：

  • 分解你所持有的一件非魔法物体，该物体大小必须小于一个6英寸立方体，将其粉碎为由其组成元素构成的细微颗粒尘埃。

  • 麻痹你自己或一名你所触碰且自愿的目标感受情绪的能力，使其进入平静、坚忍或冷淡的状态。只要你不再进行进一步的动作，该效果便可维持。

  • 抑制一个光源的强度，使其可见半径减半，只要你与其保持物理接触即可持续。以这种方式削弱的光源在同一时间只能有一个。

擦除只能影响你能够实际触碰到的一个生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Death.name: 符文：死亡 Rune: Death
Rune: Death.description:
有序的毁灭之力，负责腐化一切生物材料。死亡符文掌管衰朽与毁灭。

死亡符文以 Presence 进行成长，目标为 坚韧，对 生命值 造成 Corruption 伤害。它的对立面是混乱的 生命 符文。

The orderly force of destruction, responsible for the corruption of all biological matter. The Death rune governs decay and destruction.

The Death rune scales using Presence, targets Fortitude, and deals Corruption damage to Health. It is opposed by the chaotic rune of Life.

ennervate.name: 失神术 Ennervate
ennervate.description:
你对死亡符文的掌握使你能够与死者进行基础沟通，并对亵渎力量进行初步操纵，从而产生以下效果之一：

  • 将腐朽扩散到一个不大于1立方英尺的物体上，使植物枯萎、金属物体生锈、木头腐烂、食物变质，或让一具尸体迅速分解。魔法物品通常不受影响。

  • 使一具死亡未满七天或以其他方式保存完好的尸体，毫无生气地重演其生命最后时刻。它的移动会模仿该生物生命最后30秒内发生的动作。你无法控制该生物，它也不能以其他任何方式交流。

  • 加速一名当前处于濒死状态且自愿的生物的死亡，使其迅速而平静地离世。

失神术只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Death allows for basic communion with the dead and for rudimentary manipulation of unholy forces, producing one of the following effects:

  • Spread decay over an object no larger than a 1-foot cube, causing plants to wither, metallic objects to rust, wood to become rotten, food to grow foul, or a corpse to rapidly decompose. Magical objects are typically unaffected.

  • Cause a corpse which has been dead for less than seven days or otherwise preserved to perform a lifeless reenactment of its final moments. Its movements imitate those that occurred during the creature's final 30 seconds of life. You have no control over the creature nor can it communicate in any other way.

  • Hasten the death of a willing creature that is currently dying, causing it to pass swiftly and peacefully.

Ennervate may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Harbinger of Fear.name: 恐惧先驱 Harbinger of Fear
Harbinger of Fear.tokenName: 恐惧先驱 Harbinger of Fear

archetype.name: 散布恐惧者 Fearmonger
archetype.description:
带来恐惧与绝望者。

Bringers of terror and despair.

taxonomy.name: 先驱者 Harbinger
taxonomy.description:
来自彼方虚空的异界存在。

Otherworldly beings from the void beyond.

description.public:
一些虚空甲壳的描述。

Some void chitin description.

Eldritch Emanation.name: 邪异流溢 Eldritch Emanation
Eldritch Emanation.description:
恐惧先驱从其绽开的巨口中投射出一股充满恶意的绝望锥形区域。

The Harbinger of Fear projects a cone of malevolent despair from its blossoming maw.

eldritchEmanation.name: 邪异流溢 Eldritch Emanation
eldritchEmanation.description:
投射一次最远 10 英尺的锥形攻击，造成针对士气的心灵伤害，并在命中时施加恐慌状态，持续1 轮。

Project a cone attack up to 10 feet dealing Psychic damage to Morale and causing the Frightened condition on hit for 1 Round.

Ethereal Warp.name: 以太扭曲 Ethereal Warp
Ethereal Warp.description:
先驱者渐渐淡出现实，短暂地变为虚体，随后在最远 6 格外的一个位置重新显现。
The Harbinger fades out of reality, becoming incorporeal for a few moments before re-appearing in a location up to 6 spaces away.

etherealWarp.name: 以太扭曲 Ethereal Warp
etherealWarp.description:
消失并在距离你当前位置最多30 Feet处重新出现。此次移动不会引发任何脱离接战攻击。

Disappear and re-emerge up to 30 Feet away from your current location. This movement does not allow for any Disengagement Attack.

Harbinger of Madness.name: 疯狂先驱者 Harbinger of Madness
Harbinger of Madness.tokenName: 疯狂先驱者 Harbinger of Madness

archetype.name: 心灵扭曲者 Mindwarper
archetype.description:
一种会摧毁目睹者心智的庞大生物。
A hulking creature that destroys the sanity of those which behold it.

taxonomy.name: 先驱者 Harbinger
taxonomy.description:
来自彼界虚空的异界存在。

Otherworldly beings from the void beyond.

description.public:
一些虚空几丁质的描述。

Some void chitin description.

Devour Thoughts.name: 吞噬思维 Devour Thoughts
Devour Thoughts.description:
疯狂先驱者专注于单一目标，用多条触须缠住他们。
The Harbinger of Madness focuses on a single target, latching onto them with multiple tendrils.

devourThoughts.name: 吞噬思想 Devour Thoughts
devourThoughts.description:
用多条触须鞭击单个敌人，造成虚弱的心灵伤害，并在成功时施加震慑状态。

Lash onto a single enemy with multiple tendrils, dealing Weakened Psychic damage and inflicting the Stunned condition on a success.

Mind Flay.name: 精神鞭笞 Mind Flay
Mind Flay.description:
用旋转挥舞的触手鞭击剥裂附近的敌人，造成钝击伤害并导致心理失调。
Flay nearby foes with a whirling lash of tentacles which inflict bludgeoning damage and cause psychological disorientation.

mindFlay.name: 精神鞭笞 Mind Flay
mindFlay.description:
用可怕的触手鞭击附近的所有敌人。被此次攻击命中的目标会迷失方向，持续一轮。

Lash out with terrible tentacles against all nearby foes. Those hit by the attack become Disoriented for one Round.

ancestry.name: 魔裔 Devilkin
ancestry.description:
你生来就在自己的造物中带有出人意料的魔法影响。你的外表显露出一些明显特征，迷信的人会将其与位面生物联系起来——绯红色的皮肤、无用的翅膀或犄角、爬行动物般的眼睛。你对光的厌恶以及对火元素的超自然抗性，更难以打消人们认为你是真正恶魔的想法。

You were born with unexpected magical influence over your creation. Your physical appearance shows tell-tale signs that the superstitious associate with planar beings- crimson flesh, ineffective wings or horns, reptilian eyes. Your dislike of light and preternatural resistance to fire does little to dissuade people from thinking you are an actual devil.

background.name: 表演者 Performer
background.description:
你曾是一名巡回艺人。你学会了从容参加各种社交场合，懂得如何迎合观众，在表演中润饰细节，以引发特定的情绪反应。
You were a travelling entertainer. You learned to be comfortable attending a variety of social functions, how to play to your audience, embellishing details of your performance to evoke particular emotional responses.

biography.public:
扎拉贾是一名性情火烈的魔裔，偏好火焰术，能够编织危险性的法术与防护法术来控制战场。扎拉贾立志获得战斗法师签名天赋。

Zarajah is a spirited Devilkin with a penchant for pyromancy who weaves dangerous and warding spells to control the battlefield. Zarajah aspires to obtain the War Mage signature Talent.

description.public:
这根法师法杖是一件护符，可辅助施法，或向敌人投掷奥术火焰洪流。

This mage staff is a talisman to assist with spellcraft or hurl gouts of arcane flame at enemies.

环甲是在衬垫底层上缝制金属环制成的，与更厚重的链甲相比，它提供较少的保护，作为交换则拥有更高的机动性。

Ring mail features metal rings sewn onto a padded base, offering a compromise of less protection than heavier mail options in exchange for greater mobility.

Inspire Heroism.name: 激励英勇 Inspire Heroism
Inspire Heroism.description:
你英勇无畏的存在鼓舞着附近的盟友，使他们能够自信地发起攻击。
Your courageous presence inspires your nearby allies to strike with confidence.

inspireHeroism.name: 激励英勇 Inspire Heroism
inspireHeroism.description:
每个盟友（不包括你自己）在10 Feet内，直到其下个回合结束前进行的动作获得+1 恩惠。

Each ally, excluding yourself, within 10 Feet gains +1 Boon to actions performed until the end of their next Turn.

Gesture: Influence.name: 手势：影响 Gesture: Influence
Gesture: Influence.description:
你将符文的奥术力量强化为一种集中的直接接触，这通常是基础触碰手势的更强力演化。

影响手势使用Presence进行缩放，并以一个相邻的单一生物为目标。它对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成10 基础伤害。该手势需要1 只手来施放，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You intensify the arcane power of a Rune into a concentrated direct contact which is generally a more powerful evolution of the basic Touch gesture.

The Influence gesture scales using Presence and targets a single adjacent creature. It deals 10 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

Light Weapon Training.name: 轻型武器训练 Light Weapon Training
Light Weapon Training.description:
你知道如何以高度的灵活性与优雅在战斗中自如地运用轻型武器。你对轻型和平衡类别中的所有武器均为受训。

You know how to wield light weapons fluidly with a high degree of maneuverability and grace in combat. You are Trained with all weapons in the Light and Balanced categories.

lunge.name: 突刺 Lunge
lunge.description:
你灵巧地向前突进，以突然而出乎意料的迅捷发起一次攻击，使用一把具有灵巧特性的武器对单一目标进行一次打击，其攻击范围增加+2 feet。

此次攻击是困难的，但你不会离开当前位置，且此次攻击不会引发脱离接战。

You dart forward nimbly, making a strike with sudden and unexpected swiftness to perform a Strike with a Finesse weapon against a single target with an increased range of +2 feet.

The attack is Difficult, but you do not move from your current position nor does this attack provoke Disengagement.

Rune: Oblivion.name: 符文：湮灭 Rune: Oblivion
Rune: Oblivion.description:
一种混乱的力量，象征着对存在的毁灭与彻底抹消。湮灭符文支配着物质的消解与精神的溃散。

湮灭符文以 Intellect 进行成长，目标为 意志，并对 士气 造成 Void 伤害。它与秩序的 灵魂 符文相对立。

A chaotic force of destruction and annihilation of existence. The Oblivion rune governs unmaking of matter or decoherence of spirit.

The Oblivion rune scales using Intellect, targets Willpower, and deals Void damage to Morale. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Soul.

erase.name: 擦除 Erase
erase.description:
你对湮灭符文的掌握，使你能够在存在的结构中拆解出微小的孔洞，产生以下效果之一：

  • 将你手持的一件小于6英寸立方体的非魔法物体分解，使其碎裂为由其构成元素形成的细微颗粒尘埃。

  • 麻痹你自己或你所触碰的一名自愿目标感受情绪的能力，使其进入平静、坚忍或淡漠的状态。只要你不再进行进一步的动作，此效果即可维持。

  • 压制一个光源的强度，使其可见半径在你与其保持物理接触期间缩减一半。在任一给定时刻，只有一个光源可以用这种方式被减弱。

擦除只能影响你能够实际触碰到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Oblivion allows you to unravel tiny holes in the fabric of existence, producing one of the following effects:

  • Disintegrate a non-magical object you hold smaller than a 6-inch cube, sundering it to a fine particulate dust of its component elements.

  • Anesthetize the ability to feel emotion from yourself or a willing target that you touch, causing it to enter a placid, stoic, or dispassionate state. This effect can be maintained as long as you make no further Action.

  • Subdue the potency of a light source, causing its visible radius to be reduced by half for as long as you maintain physical contact with it. Only one light source may be dampened in this way at a given time.

Erase may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Rune: Flame.name: 符文：火焰 Rune: Flame
Rune: Flame.description:
元素热能的混沌之力。火焰符文掌管火与热。

火焰符文基于智力进行成长，以 反射 为目标，并对 生命值 造成 火元素伤害。它与秩序的 霜冻符文相对立。

The chaotic force of elemental, thermal energy. The Flame rune governs fire and heat.

The Flame rune scales using Intellect, targets Reflex, and deals Fire damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Frost.

enkindle.name: 引燃 Enkindle
enkindle.description:
你对火焰符文的掌控使你能够以富有创造性的方式操纵火焰与热能，产生以下效果之一：

  • 显现出一团一英寸球体大小的元素火焰，可以点燃蜡烛、火把或其他可燃材料。

  • 为你的身体赋予瞬间的热能护盾，使你在紧接着进行的、消耗1 动作或更少的动作中，对火焰伤害获得免疫。

  • 控制一小片区域内火焰的移动，使其闪烁、舞动或变换，形成一场光与影的生动表演。

引燃只能影响你能够以身体接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。

Your command of the Rune of Flame allows you to manipulate fire and thermal energy in creative ways, producing one of the following effects:

  • Manifest a burst of elemental flame in one inch sphere which can ignite a candle, torch, or other flammable materials.

  • Imbue your body with momentary thermal shielding which provides you with immunity to fire damage on an immediately subsequent action that costs 1 Action or less.

  • Control the movement of flames within a small area, causing them to flicker, dance, or shift in an animated performance of light and shadow.

Enkindle may only affect a creature or object you can physically touch. You may attempt other uses similar those above, the effectiveness of which is decided by the Gamemaster.

Gesture: Arrow.name: 手势：箭头 Gesture: Arrow
Gesture: Arrow.description:
你向远处目标掷出一枚灌注了符文魔法力量的投射物。

Arrow 手势基于智力进行成长，可将单个生物作为目标，最远距离为 60 英尺，对未能抵抗该法术的目标造成8 基础伤害。施放该手势需要1 只手，基础消耗为3 动作和1 专注。

You hurl a projectile imbued with the magical power of a Rune at a distant target.

The Arrow gesture scales using Intellect and targets a single creature up to a distance of 60 feet, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. This gesture requires 1 Hand to cast and has a base cost of 3 Action and 1 Focus.

War Mage.name: 战斗法师 War Mage
War Mage.description:
你的施法已被磨炼成战争兵器，用以挫败其他法师的咒语。即使你无法辨认正在施放的法术，你也可以询问游戏主持人，自己是否知晓一种能够反制敌方法术的符文。你在任何反制法术尝试上获得+2恩惠。

Your spellcraft is honed as a weapon of war to thwart the incantations of other magi. You may ask the Gamemaster if you know a Rune capable of countering an enemy spell, even if you do not recognize the spell being cast. You gain +2 Boons to any Counterspell attempt.

Impetus.name: 动因 Impetus
Impetus.description:
你善于利用他人思考缓慢的弱点。如果你在某个战斗轮次的先攻顺序中位列第一，你获得 +1 当前和最大动作。

You are gifted at exploiting the slowness with which others think. If you are first in Initiative order during a round of Combat, you gain +1 current and maximum Action.

Opportunistic Spellcraft.name: 借机施法 Opportunistic Spellcraft
Opportunistic Spellcraft.description:
你敏捷的思维能够编织魔法，利用稍纵即逝的机会之窗。你可以用接触手势进行一次脱离攻击，而不是进行一次近战武器攻击。

Your quick thinking can weave magic to exploit brief windows of opportunity. You may make a Disengagement Attack using the Touch Gesture instead of a melee weapon attack.

Pyromancer.name: 炎术师 Pyromancer
Pyromancer.description:
你对编织火焰符文极为娴熟。使用该符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[burning]。

燃烧效果持续1 轮，并将你的智力属性作为火元素伤害，同时作用于生命值和士气。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Flame. Spells which use this Rune cause @Condition[burning] on Critical Hits.

The Burning effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Intellect score as Fire damage to both Health and Morale.

Gesture: Pulse.name: 手势：脉冲 Gesture: Pulse
Gesture: Pulse.description:
将一个符文的奥术力量驱逐为以你为中心、向外扩散的半径范围。

Pulse手势按Presence进行缩放，并产生一个10英尺半径的散发区域，对未能抗拒该法术的目标造成8基础伤害。该手势需要2只手施放，基础消耗为5动作和2专注。

试玩测试说明

该天赋目前位于一个第4阶节点。它最终将只能在更高等级时获得（可能需要6级）。目前为了测试而“提前”开放。

Expel the arcane power of a Rune in a radius that travels outward with you at its center.

The Pulse gesture scales using Presence and produces an emanation with 10 foot radius, dealing 8 Base Damage to targets which fail to Resist the spell. The gesture requires 2 Hands to cast and has a base cost of 5 Action and 2 Focus.

Playtest Notes

This talent is currently placed at a Tier 4 node. It will eventually only be attainable at a higher level (probably Level 6 required). It is currently available "early" for testing.

Arcana Novice.name: 奥术新手 Arcana Novice
Arcana Novice.description:
你所受的教育涵盖了形而上学与魔法理论的基础、符文之间的关系、秩序与混沌的对立本质，以及对灵体存在的粗略引介，包括最广为人知的被神化与被妖魔化的崇拜对象。你获得奥术技能的新手等级，并且不再被视为该技能的未受训状态。

你对魔法基本语法原则的初步理解，足以鉴别一个法术或仪式可能使用的是哪一种次级符文，以及所使用的手势（但无法判断其屈折变化）。你能够分辨一个存在更多地受到混沌还是秩序的影响，也能察觉常见灵体（无论较弱或较强）的迹象。你对宗教习俗也有足够了解，能够在与崇拜特定灵体或神祇的人交流时不至于出丑。

Your education covered the fundamentals of metaphysics and magical theory, the relationship between the runes, the opposing nature of order and chaos, and a cursory introduction to spiritual beings including the most commonly known deified and demonized figures of worship. You gain the Novice rank in the Arcana skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

Your rudimentary understanding of the principle grammar of magic is sufficient to identify which lesser rune a spell or ritual may be using, as well as the gesture used (if not the inflection). You can identify whether a figure is influenced more by chaos or by order, and can spot the signs of common spirits (both lesser and greater). You know enough about religious customs to communicate with those who worship a particular spirit or deity without embarrassing yourself.

Strategic Repositioning.name: 战略性重新部署 Strategic Repositioning
Strategic Repositioning.description:
你总会提前思考，一旦危险逼近自己该如何站位。在战斗遭遇的第1回合开始前，前提是你并非未察觉，你可以立即向任意允许的方向移动4英尺。

如果有多个战斗参与者拥有此特性，则重新站位按照先攻的逆序进行。

You are always thinking ahead about where to position yourself should danger loom. Before Turn 1 of a Combat encounter, provided that you are not Unaware, you may immediately move 4 feet in any permitted direction.

If multiple combatants have this feature, repositioning occurs in reverse order of Initiative.

Lightbringer.name: 光明使者 Lightbringer
Lightbringer.description:
你在编织照明符文方面技艺高超。使用该符文的法术在造成暴击时会施加 @Condition[irradiated] 状态。

辐照效果持续1 轮，并对生命值和士气都造成等同于你的Presence属性值的Radiant伤害。

You are highly skilled in weaving the Rune of Illumination. Spells which use this Rune cause the @Condition[irradiated] condition on Critical Hits.

The Irradiated effect lasts for 1 Round and deals your Presence score as Radiant damage to both Health and Morale.

Awareness Novice.name: 察觉新手 Awareness Novice
Awareness Novice.description:
你已接受过情境察觉的基础训练，能够注意到周围环境中的重要细节。你在察觉技能中获得新手等级，且不再被视为该技能未受训。

你知道进入房间时要检查出口，也知道如何寻找隐藏的武器、隐蔽的陷阱以及其他威胁。你知道如何发现自己何时被跟踪，以及如何搜查常见的藏身之处。

You have been trained in the basics of situational awareness, and are able to notice important details about your environment. You gain the Novice rank in the Awareness skill and are no longer considered Untrained in that skill.

You know to check for exits when you enter a room, and how to look for concealed weapons, hidden traps, and other threats. You know how to spot when you are being followed, and how to search for common hiding places.

Versatile Translator.name: 多才多艺的翻译者 Versatile Translator
Versatile Translator.description:
你拥有语言学方面的学术背景，或对语言有一种天生的敏锐直觉。你的能力使你能够解读用多种语言写成的文本的基本含义。

你可以将一种你不懂、但使用通用字形或字符书写的语言文本，翻译成一种你所懂的语言。进行这样的翻译时，你需要每个词花费一分钟，将文本转写成一种你能够理解的语言。

你的译文较为粗略，且往往缺乏细微差别，但确实包含了文本的所有要点。

You have a scholarly background in linguistics or an intuitive knack for languages. Your capabilities enable you to decipher the basic meaning of text written in a variety of languages.

You can translate text of a language you do not know that is written using a common set of glyphs or characters to a language that you do know. Creating such a translation requires spending one minute per word to transcribe the text into a language which you understand.

Your translations are rudimentary and often lack nuance, but they do contain all essential points of the text.

Iramancer.name: 艾拉曼瑟 Iramancer
Iramancer.description:
你的奥术能力由愤怒驱动。处于激怒状态时，你仍然可以消耗专注，且你的所有法术攻击额外造成 2 点伤害。
Your feats of arcana are fueled by anger. While Enraged you may still spend Focus and you deal 2 additional damage to all spell attacks.

Counterspell.name: 反制法术 Counterspell
Counterspell.description:
你会立刻对正在施放的法术作出反应，并构成一个符文与手势，旨在瓦解并抵消敌方法师的施法。

试玩测试说明

这个动作现在可以在试玩测试中使用，但它尚未完全自动化。可以执行反制法术，但需要由游戏主持人手动撤销先前已应用的法术，并手动扣除其动作与专注消耗。反制法术整体流程中的这些步骤将在后续更新中实现自动化，因此一旦反制法术被确认，也会同时确认被反制的法术，但其效果会被移除。

You immediately react to a spell being cast and compose a rune and gesture designed to unravel and negate the spellcraft of an enemy mage.

Playtest Notes

This action can now be used in playtesting, but it is not yet fully automated. The Counterspell can be performed, but it is up to the Gamemaster to manually reverse a previously applied spell and to manually deduct its Action and Focus cost. These steps of the overall Counterspell workflow will be automated in a subsequent update such that a confirmed Counterspell will also confirm the spell that was countered, but with its effects removed.

counterspell.name: 反制法术 Counterspell
counterspell.description:
你将奥术能量塑造成一道对抗性的施法，目标是你在30尺内看见的一名施法者。

指定一个你已知的符文和手势来尝试反制该法术。若你选择的符文与该法术所使用的某个符文相对，则你的此次尝试获得+2恩惠。若你选择的手势与正在施放的手势完全相同，你的此次尝试也会获得+2恩惠。

对目标的意志防御进行一次无害的法术攻击。若你的掷骰结果超过其防御，该法术即被反制，其魔法被消除，不产生任何效果。

You form arcane energy into a countervailing spellcraft, targeting a spellcaster you can see within 30 feet.

Designate a Rune and Gesture which you know to attempt to counter the spell. Choosing a Rune which is opposed to one used in the spell grants +2 Boons to your attempt. Selecting the identical Gesture as the one being cast also adds +2 Boons to your attempt.

Perform a harmless Spell Attack against your target's Willpower defense. If your roll exceeds their defense, the spell is countered and its magic is nullified, producing no effects.
counterspell.condition:
另一个你能看见的生物正在施放一个法术。
Another creature which you can see is casting a spell.

Flame Proficiency.name: 火焰熟练度 Flame Proficiency
Flame Proficiency.description:
你精通运用火焰符文进行施法。使用该符文施放的法术获得+1技能加值。

试玩测试说明

该天赋最终还会为引燃动作提供升级，扩展其效果，或加入新的使用选项。

You have fluency in weaving spellcraft using the Rune of Flame. You gain a +1 Skill Bonus for spells cast using this Rune.

Playtest Notes

This talent will eventually also provide an upgrade to the Enkindle action, expanding its effectiveness or including new options for how to use it.

Rune: Kinesis.name: 符文：念动力 Rune: Kinesis
Rune: Kinesis.description:
空间与物理移动的混沌力量。念动力符文掌管一切与移动行为和物质形态相关的事物。

念动力符文以Presence进行成长，针对Physical防御，并对生命值造成Bludgeoning、Piercing或Slashing伤害。它与秩序的控制符文相对立。

The chaotic force of space and physical movement. The Kinesis rune governs all things related to the act of movement and physicality.

The Kinesis rune scales using Presence, targets Physical defense, and deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage to Health. It is opposed by the orderly rune of Control.

propel.name: 推进 Propel
propel.description:
你对念动力符文的掌控使你能够对重力施加局部控制，以执行基础的念动操作，产生以下效果之一：

  • 将15英尺内一个未固定且重量不大于1的物体拉向你并接住它。由生物已装备或持有的物体，除非该生物自愿放手，否则绝不视为未固定。

  • 将一个你持有且重量不大于1的物体弹向一个最远30英尺外的目标。该物体会以适中的速度，沿直线精准无误地飞向该目标。物体路径上的任何生物都可以作出反应来接住它，只要他们有一只空闲的手即可。

  • 使一个你接触到的物体或自愿生物悬浮在半空中，其重量小于或等于你Presence的10倍，并将其位置从原本所在处向任意方向改变最多20英尺。只要你不再采取进一步的动作且未处于@Condition[incapacitated]，你就可以无限期维持这种悬浮。

除非另有说明，推进只能影响你能够以身体实际接触到的生物或物体。你也可以尝试其他与上述类似的用途，其效果由游戏主持人裁定。
